mapper.insert:
insert into goods_category_detail
goodsCategoryId,
nextCategoryName,
createdDate,
nextCategoryImg,
#{goodsCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{nextCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{nextCategoryImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update goods_category
typeName = #{typeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where goodsCategoryId = #{goodsCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT id,nextCategoryName FROM goods_category_detail WHERE goodsCategoryId = #{goodsCategoryId}
